examples: Intel is now looking beyond 2020 at photonics and quantum effects such as spin.
Photonics involves generation, modulation, transmission and processing of light.
The photonic chip, built by scientists from Bristol's Centre for Quantum Photonics, USES light rather than electricity to pass information.
Intel, the kingpin in microprocessor chips, has also announced a series of milestones in silicon photonics.
Birck also wants to have a cross-connect to sell in the hot photonics arena.
